justification: Pure data-structure layer: per-(namespace,key) revision lists, retention-policy machinery, in-memory reference RevisionStore. No filesystem, network, process, environment, csprng, or wallclock access — `archived_at_ms` is caller-supplied and `purge_due(now_ms)` takes time as a parameter. Persistent stores (vault-revisions-fs, vault-revisions-postgres) are sibling crates that declare their own capabilities.
